steps.prompt: Extract the email from 'Send feedback to user@widgets.io please', then get the domain, then convert it to uppercase. Answer only with the final text.
Extract the email from 'Report to ops@data-center.net', get the domain, then check if the domain contains 'center'. Answer only true or false.
Extract the email from 'Write to hi@ab.cd for info', then get the length of the email, then check if that length is even. Answer only true or false.
